rows.label: qev055101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Comrade, thank you for your help in
the Nightglow Forest. Thanks to you,
we were able to reach NLA like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0002
rows.name:
We were just about to discuss what to do
from here on out with our companions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Sun'boiton, "discussing" is a truly
Earthling-oriented expression, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Since there are no differences in opinion
among us, we have merely gathered for
final confirmation, have we not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0005
rows.name:
True. We are apostles of the Ovah.
Naturally, no debate could ever arise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev055101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what the Ovah is.

rows.label: qev055101_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev055101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask why debate does not arise.

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0006
rows.name:
It is our reason for existence, and
the absolute will we must obey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0007
rows.name: It is the very peace that connects us—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0008
rows.name:
It is difficult to explain in words,
but it absolutely exists within us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0009
rows.name:
We live by obeying the
Ovah inside our bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0010
rows.name:
And it exists within all of
us, connecting our wills.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0011
rows.name:
It is difficult to explain in words, but
because we share the will of the Ovah, we
arrive at the exact same conclusions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0012
rows.name:
...By the way, Kun'eibu, what happened
to Sun'osaragu and Kon'eibu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Gathering them here should
be your role as our leader.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hmm, I couldn't see Sun'osaragu,
so I sent Kon'eibu to go get him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0015
rows.name:
The probability of him being late
is 93.6% impossible... I hope
nothing strange has happened...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0016
rows.name:
Kun'eibu, an emergency has
occurred. I was tracing
Sun'osaragu's whereabouts, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0017
rows.name:
in the process, I discovered traces
of Definia infiltrating NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0018
rows.name:
Definia...? Does that mean Sun'osaragu
fell into their hands...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev055101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask for more details about the Definia.

rows.label: qev055101_JNK0040
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev055101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Grasp the situation and
offer your cooperation.

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0019
rows.name:
They are a covert unit belonging to the Growth— A
group specializing in infiltrating enemy territory.
They possess the ability to mimic various lifeforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0020
rows.name:
For instance... they could easily
change their appearance to match an
Earthling and infiltrate this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0021
rows.name:
If they have slipped into this city,
and Sun'osaragu has vanished...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0022
rows.name:
It is too early to draw
conclusions, but it is highly
likely he is in grave danger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Earthling, would you be
willing to accept a request
to search for Sun'osaragu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Please. If the Definia are involved, powerless
beings like us would only end up being killed
even if we tried to track them down...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Thank you. Then let us formalize this
contract as a mission to search for
Sun'osaragu. Please present your terminal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0026
rows.name:
The contract is established. Now,
Kon'eibu, please relay all the
information you know to the Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Yes. The last time I saw him was at
the elevator in the Residential Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0028
rows.name:
I watched him head up the elevator
toward the Ma-non ship, and then I
returned to the Residential Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0029
rows.name:
...In other words, there is a high
probability that there are witnesses
in locations inferred from that path.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Gathering information should be
easy between fellow Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Please hurry and trace his whereabouts,
and find out where he was taken.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0032
rows.name:
How about it? Do you feel
inclined to accept the mission
to search for Sun'osaragu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0033
rows.name:
If you are, please present your terminal.
Let us formalize the contract.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0034
rows.name:
The contract is established. Now,
Kon'eibu, please relay all the
information you know to the Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0035
rows.name:
Yes. The last time I saw him was at
the elevator in the Residential Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0036
rows.name:
I watched him head up the elevator
toward the Ma-non ship, and then I
returned to the Residential Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0037
rows.name:
...In other words, there is a high
probability that there are witnesses
in locations inferred from that path.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0038
rows.name:
Gathering information should be
easy between fellow Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0039
rows.name:
Please hurry and trace his whereabouts,
and find out where he was taken.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0040
rows.name:
Countless deserters from the Growth have
been brutally murdered by the Definia.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0041
rows.name:
They strengthen their control
over the organization through
such absolute violence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0042
rows.name:
...Please hurry. Use Kon'eibu's
information and track down
his whereabouts quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0043
rows.name:
Well...? Were you able to track
down Sun'osaragu's whereabouts?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_JNK0050
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev055101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Tell him there is a high probability
he is in the Valley of Oblivion.

rows.label: qev055101_JNK0060
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev055101_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask if the "bug-like
person" is Sun'osaragu.

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0044
rows.name:
The Valley of Oblivion... They
took him to a troublesome place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0045
rows.name:
I have heard that we appear
that way to Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0046
rows.name:
That is undoubtedly Sun'osaragu.
The Valley of Oblivion... They
took him to a troublesome place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0047
rows.name:
However, considering they didn't kill him on
the spot, we can conclude that they still see
enough utility in us to keep him alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0048
rows.name:
We might still be able to save
Sun'osaragu. We will immediately
prepare to head there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0049
rows.name:
We should hurry. The Ovah is restless.
This feels like a premonition that
something is about to happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0050
rows.name:
Coming from you, who are sensitive
to the movements of the Ovah, that
premonition is worth considering.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0051
rows.name:
—[ST:playername ], I want you to go on ahead
and rescue Sun'osaragu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0052
rows.name:
As long as he is alive, no matter
his condition, we will use Orphean
wisdom to bring him back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_JNK0070
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev055101_SEL0071
rows.name:
Suggest that it would be
better to act together.

rows.label: qev055101_JNK0080
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev055101_SEL0081
rows.name:
Follow Sun'boiton's instructions and
head to the Valley of Oblivion.

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0053
rows.name:
It is true that acting on
our own carries risks...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0054
rows.name:
But as time passes, the probability of
finding Sun'osaragu will only decrease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0055
rows.name:
This decision was made after considering
everything. Please, do as I ask.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0056
rows.name:
Head to the Valley of Oblivion immediately.
As long as we have the right equipment, we
can at least stay hidden and survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0057
rows.name:
The Definia possess high combat
capabilities, but I am certain
that you can achieve victory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0058
rows.name:
Please, you must rescue Sun'osaragu
in the Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0059
rows.name:
As long as he is alive, we will bring him
back to NLA by any means necessary...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0060
rows.name:
Please head to the Valley of Oblivion
immediately and rescue him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055101_MSG0061
rows.name:
In order for us to prosper in
this place, we need Sun'osaragu's
technological expertise...[ST:wait ]
